## Summary
<!-- Which documentation needs improvement? -->

## Problem
<!-- What's unclear, missing, or confusing? -->

## Suggested Improvement
<!-- How can we improve this documentation? -->

### Example
```
Current:
[paste current text]

Suggested:
[paste improvement]
```

## Affected Documentation
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] QUICK_REFERENCE.md
- [ ] PAPER_PLAN.md
- [ ] In-code docstrings
- [ ] Other: 

## Checklist
- [ ] I have read the affected documentation
- [ ] My suggestion is clear and specific
- [ ] I have provided examples
